message:
fix: bigint division precision loss in SQL evaluator

The divide case used toNumber() on both operands, losing precision for
bigint values > MAX_SAFE_INTEGER. Add numericDiv() helper that preserves
bigint when both operands are bigint or safe integers, matching the
pattern used by add/subtract/multiply (numericOp).

Example: 9007199254740993n / 3n
  Before: 3002399751580330.5 (float, wrong for integer division)
  After:  3002399751580331n  (bigint, correct truncated division)
